name: Crazy Clown
short_description: Crazy Clown - Top Down Shooter, a game in which you need to take your own and destroy all your abusers. You have not only a machine gun in your arsenal. Use all the variety of weapons and crush your enemies. Take revenge on them, clowns can not only make fun!
detailed_description:
Crazy Clown - Top Down Shooter, a game in which you need to take your own and destroy all your abusers. You have not only a machine gun in your arsenal. Use all the variety of weapons and crush your enemies. Take revenge on them, clowns can not only make fun!

Features of the game:
- Hardcore
- Beautiful Pixel-Art
- Variety of levels
- Music
